beats.text: An MIT student steps into a forest. A label appears: ecosystem.
Zoom in on the student. A label appears: organism. One level down.
Zoom into the student's face — the eye comes into focus. Label: organ.
Peel back the eye. The retina layer is highlighted. Label: tissue.
Zoom into the retina — a single photoreceptor cell is isolated. Label: cell. Inside it, mitochondria appear. Label: organelle.
Zoom into one mitochondrion. A molecule of ATP appears, spinning slowly. Label: molecule. Seven levels — one continuous zoom from forest to molecule.
